Document:
# Shadow Demon
Shadow Demons are horrific monstrosities that rule the darkness. They source their power from dark areas on station with the sole directive of using their special abilities to murder crew members. However, these demons are highly vulnerable to light, if they spend too much time out of darkness they will very quickly die.
## Playing Shadow Demon
Shadow Demons are frail but lethal ambush predators, striking quickly from the darkness to drag away lone crewmembers. Shadow Demons do considerable damage with each strike, and deactivate any light producing objects they hit. They can use Shadow Crawl to quickly reposition after a kill or during a chase.
Light is its worst enemy, however, and leaving the darkness for only a few seconds is fatal. Being in Shadow Crawl will halve the damage dealt by light. Darkness, on the other hand, will rapidly heal the Shadow Demon and increase its speed, so fighting on dark turf is preferable.
## Abilities
- Shadow Grapple: Fire one of your hands, if it hits a person it pulls them in, immobilizing them for 2 seconds and dealing heavy damage in the process. If you hit a structure you get pulled to the structure. Any light sources nearby that are hit with this will be disabled.
- Shadow Crawl: Use darkness to phase out of existence. The Shadow Demon equivalent of Bloodcrawl. Very useful for ambushing, rapid movement, and escaping danger. Will not work if near a light source. Halves damage taken from lights.
## Shadow Cocoon
To counter the light, you can also wrap your dead victims into a shadow cocoon by clicking on them and waiting 4 seconds. Shadow cocoons make an area of darkness and disable or extinguish any lights in their surroundings. Shadow cocoons can be used as bait as well, by Alt-Clicking on them to produce noises.
## Heart of Darkness
After a Shadow Demon has been slain, it will leave behind a Heart of Darkness for the slayer to implant on themselves and gain a fraction of the demon's power, now being able to use the Shadow Grapple ability.
This text was taken from Paradise station (todo: expand)
